name: Doomsday cleaner
short_description: In the game, you will play as a survivor, facing endless zombie threats. You need to use your weapons and intelligence to clean up every zombie, protect yourself, and find hope for survival.
detailed_description:
Zombies have destroyed your home. You will pick up weapons, embark on the path of revenge, clean up and hunt down every zombie, and rebuild your home. In this world full of terror and despair, you are the last survivor, the only hope. Your homeland used to be a prosperous and beautiful city, but now it has become a wasteland and a realm of death.
Your task is to clean up every zombie, protect your own life, and find hope for survival. You will face endless zombie threats, relentlessly chasing after you, eager to devour your body and soul. You must use the weapons and wisdom in your hands to engage in a life and death struggle with zombies.
In this world full of danger and challenges, you will experience countless life and death tests, but as long as you persevere and believe in yourself, you will surely be able to rebuild your home and find hope for survival. Now, pick up your weapons, embark on the path of revenge, clear and hunt down every zombie, and rebuild your home!

supported_languages: English, French, German, Russian, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Brazil, Korean
